shortestpath.002: The path to clangd executable, e.g.: /usr/bin/clangd.
shortestpath.003: Allows the path to be a script e.g.: clangd.sh.
shortestpath.006: Extra clang flags used to parse files when no compilation database is found.
shortestpath.007: Auto restart clangd (up to 4 times) if it crashes.
shortestpath.008: Check for language server updates on startup.
shortestpath.009: Warn about conflicting extensions and suggest disabling them.
shortestpath.010: Enable code completion provided by the language server
shortestpath.011: Enable hovers provided by the language server
